'''Ubris''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hapan]] warrior that served the royal family of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] for two generations, including as a personal guard to [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="CSWE" /> She was with the prince when an assassin attempted to kill him from atop a [[blizcot]].<ref name="NJO">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{1st}}
